/CAL MODIFICATION OF STATE PRISON AND CLARIFY SENTENCE IN COUNT 6/CTORD TDAYS MODIFICATION OF SENTENCE IS AS FOLLOWS - THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TORECEIVE A TOTAL OF 1,462 CREDITS, AMENDMENT TO  SENTENCE EFFECTIVE 12-16-10 IS TO REFLECT THAT DEFENDANT WAS ORIGINALLY SENTENCED TO 8 YRS &8 MONTHSSTATE PRISON FOR COUNTS 2,3 5 AND 1 YR COUNTY JAIL IN MISD COUNT 6,FOR A TOTAL SENTENCE OF 9 YRS & 8 MOS, FELONY COUNT 5 IS DISMISSED TODAY, IN LIGHTOF THE DISMISSAL OF COUNT 5, THE SENTENCE IS REDUCED BY 1 YR & 4 MONTHS, FOR AN AMENDED TOTAL SENTENCE OF 7 YRS & 4 MONTHS, THE 1 YR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IN COUNT 6 IS TO RUN CONCURRENT TO THE SENTENCE IN COUNTS 2 AND 3,ALL OTHER CONDITIONS OF THE ORIGINAL SENTENCE ARE TO REMAIN IN EFFECT,/CCC:2, 3, 6/

/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED AS TO ALL COUNTS EXCEPT JUDGMENT IN COUNT 5 IS REVERSED/X:MATTER IS REMANDED TO THE TRIAL COURT FOR EXERCISE OF ITS DISCRETION IN SENTENCING ON COUNT 6,/CONTD:TO SET/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE ON MISD, COUNT 6/X:ON 08-14-09 THE DEFENDANT WAS INCORRECTLY SENTENCED ON MISDEMEANOR COUNT6 TO 1 YR STATE PRISON CONCURRENT TO SENTENCING IN COUNT 2,/CTORD:VACATE SENTENCING OF 1 YEAR STATE PRISON ON COUNT 6 ORDERED ON 08-14-09/CTORD:TODAY'S ORDER IS TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED  ON THE MISD, COUNT 6, AND SENTENCING ON ALLOTHER COUNTS ARE TO REMAIN/X:AS TO MISD, COUNT 6 SENTENCING TODAY:/CJ:987D/CTS:987/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCING CREDITS/X:DEFENDANT WAS SENTENCED ON 08-14-09, BUT SHOULD HAVE BEEN RECEIVED MORE CREDITS, THERE IS NO OPPOSITION BYTHE D,A, FOR THE CORRECTION OF CREDITS/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE 975 ACTUAL DAYS, 487 SAGE CREDITS FOR A TOTAL OF 1462 DAYS CREDIT,  ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITION OF THE SENTENCING OF 08-14-09 ARE TO REMAIN/ /AJW/CH1:SP 6Y:U/CTSP:975/STATES/ DNACOMP/SECFEE/ICNA/VF5:800/PAR/CDC/CTORD:PROBATION FEE STAY IS LIFTED, DEFENDANT TO PAY $200 TO ADULT PROBATION DEPT, $20 COURTSECURITY FEE IS TIMES 4 FOR TOTAL OF $80/654:4/CS1:3 AND 5/CCC:2 AND 6//CTORD:PRIOR CONVICTIONS FROM 1978 AND 1994 ARE STRICKEN BASED ON AGE OF CONVICTIONS/

/AJW/CH1 SP 6Y U/CTSP 968/STATES/ DNACOMP/SECFEE/ICNA/VF5 800/PAR/CDC/CTORD:PROBATION FEE STAY IS LIFTED, DEFENDANT TO PAY $200 TO ADULT PROBATION DEPT, $20 COURT SECURITY FEE IS TIMES 4 FOR TOTAL OF $80/CTORD:16 MONTHS STATE PRISON ON COUNT 4, STAYED/ /654:4/CS1:3 AND 5/CCC:2 AND 6/CTORD:PRIOR CONVICTIONS FROM 1978 AND 1994 ARE STRICKEN BASED ON AGE OF CONVICTIONS/
